posts.text:
Come on the show!! We’ll talk about how self deprecating we both are!!


Elon Musk (@elonmusk)

Not as good as you! Stop being so humble.



— https://nitter.net/elonmusk/status/2034773028257837379#m

He is also a businessman.


Elon Musk (@elonmusk)

He is a great comedian too



— https://nitter.net/elonmusk/status/2034525806958121033#m

Elon Musk is an extremely skilled propagandist.


Elon Musk (@elonmusk)

Jon Stewart is an extremely skilled propagandist disguised as a truth-teller



— https://nitter.net/elonmusk/status/2034520918870131103#m

New podcast…


The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart (@weeklyshowpod)

🚨 NEW EPISODE OUT ON YOUTUBE! 🚨

Jon is joined by disinformation expert @noUpside and tech journalist @CaseyNewton to discuss ⬇️:

>> SAVE Act
>> Algorithms & Election Influence
>> Oligarchs & Free Speech
>> Pushing Bullshit
piped.video/watch?v=PQntN2mF…




— https://nitter.net/weeklyshowpod/status/2034338298270023997#m

How are we all going to die!! A lighthearted new podcast!!


The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart (@weeklyshowpod)

🚨New episode out on YouTube!🚨

Jon is joined by artificial intelligence & defense experts @paul_scharre and @SarahShoker to discuss ⬇️:

>> AI + Military = ?
>> Anthropic & Open AI
>> AI Personalities
>> Pizza & Tostadas
piped.video/watch?v=NAWjXmsN…




— https://nitter.net/weeklyshowpod/status/2031806106800922846#m

New war new pod


The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart (@weeklyshowpod)

🚨New episode out on YouTube! 🚨
Jon, @amanpour and Amb. @wendyrsherman discuss ⬇️:

>> Iran & US/Israel
>> What’s the Plan? Was there a Plan?
>> Drive-By Negotiations
>> Tough Decision: Taco Bell or Arby’s?

piped.video/watch?v=02Ns6EbC…




— https://nitter.net/weeklyshowpod/status/2029304578965938654#m

New podcast!!! Non SOTU
Edition!!!


The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart (@weeklyshowpod)

🚨 New episode out on YouTube! 🚨
Jon and @AliVelshi discuss ⬇️:

>> Canada vs. USA or Trump
>> Immigration & The Middle Class
>> Media: Corruption vs. Integrity
>> Punching the Monkey
piped.video/watch?v=Nqq-u3qG…




— https://nitter.net/weeklyshowpod/status/2026746348226191693#m

New pod!!! Now with lemony Econ!!!


The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart (@weeklyshowpod)

🚨 New episode out on YouTube! 🚨

Jon and @oren_cass discuss ⬇️:

>> More Econ Talk!
>> Financialization
>> Tantrumnomics
>> The Washington Post, DOGE and Lunch!
piped.video/watch?v=SL2aA8cg…




— https://nitter.net/weeklyshowpod/status/2021679663425499397#m

Really enjoyed!!! Keep your office hours open for me!!


Richard H Thaler (@R_Thaler)

OK this was fun. I did not have doing a deep dive on Obamacare on my bingo card! What I wish I had thought to say at the end was to remember that the ACA passed by one vote. That limits what we can do. Anyway not my specialty! Many thanks to the show and to Jon.



— https://nitter.net/R_Thaler/status/2019181820542358014#m

New podcast!!! Econ fiiiiighhhhttt!!


The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart (@weeklyshowpod)

🚨 New episode NOW out on YouTube! 🚨

Jon & Nobel laureate @R_Thaler discuss ⬇️:

>> Behavioral Economics
>> Economists vs. Reality
>> Mugs, Mugs, and more Mugs!
>> Bad Bunny is Good Bunny
piped.video/watch?v=rZczEzMu…




— https://nitter.net/weeklyshowpod/status/2019141566435299518#m

New podcast on our real overlords!!!


The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart (@weeklyshowpod)

🚨 New episode out on YouTube! 🚨
Jon, @radleybalko and @josephfcox discuss ⬇️:

>> Trump & Miller & Bovino, oh my!
>> ICE Tech & Tactics
>> Policing & Protesting
>> A Simple Thank You
piped.video/watch?v=_hEhGuj5…




— https://nitter.net/weeklyshowpod/status/2016610341128446071#m
Floyd Vivino…legend.

New pod…what do actual Europeans think here…


The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart (@weeklyshowpod)

🚨 New episode out on YouTube! 🚨
Jon, @adam_tooze & Ivan Krastev discuss ⬇️:

>> Greenland, EU & NATO
>> Trump’s Legacy?
>> Border btwn Democracy & Authoritarianism
>> Are We F**ked?
piped.video/watch?v=haPtWYU4…




— https://nitter.net/weeklyshowpod/status/2014069549352575260#m

First new podcast of the year…I’ve been away…everything is still great right?? Also I am now on instagram jonstewart…so you guys can all call me a Jew over there as well!!


The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart (@weeklyshowpod)

🚨 New episode out on YouTube! 🚨
Jon and @FareedZakaria discuss ⬇️:

>> Donroe Doctrine
>> Coerced Compliance vs Alliance
>> Big F**k Small
>> Daily Show vs. Weekly Show 
piped.video/watch?v=Rq2VgWv0…




— https://nitter.net/weeklyshowpod/status/20115
